title: LGBT NATIONAL HOTLINE - 211info
text: LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL AND TRANSGENDER NATIONAL HELP CENTER LGBT NATIONAL HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides telephone, online private one-to-one chat, and email peer support for LGBT callers of all ages to talk about coming-out issues, relationship concerns, bullying, workplace issues, HIV/AIDS anxiety, safer-sex information, etc. Also maintains the GLBT National Resource Database, an online resource database with information on youth groups, social and support organizations, and gay-friendly religious organizations, sports leagues, student groups, etc. 2261 Market Street #296 San Francisco, CA 94114 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as gay, lesbian, bisexual, and transgender Hours: Monday-Friday 11am-8pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (888) 843-4564 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (888) 843-4564 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, chat, or email for more information. Visit website to search resource database. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: LGBTQ2+ Helplines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LGBT NATIONAL SENIOR HOTLINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LGBT NATIONAL YOUTH TALKLINE MUTUAL SUPPORT - LGBT NATIONAL COMING OUT SUPPORT HOTLINE MUTUAL SUPPORT - MODERATED YOUTH CHAT ROOMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL AND TRANSGENDER NATIONAL HELP CENTER
